name: CYTOKINETICS INC. DL-,001
summary: Cytokinetics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing muscle activators and muscle inhibitors as potential treatments for debilitating diseases in which muscle performance is compromised. The company's headquarters are located in South San Francisco, California. They aim to improve the health and overall quality of life for people with diseases like heart failure and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS).
